title: AI and modern technology may pose challenges to judiciary in future: Union Home Minister Amit Shah
description: Union Home Minister Amit Shah on Sunday said artificial intelligence and modern technology may pose fresh challenges to the judiciary in the future, while stressing that technology and justice must work “in harmony.”Shah was speaking at Bharat Mandapam in New Delhi during the launch of two books penned by Solicitor General Tushar Mehta - The Bench, the Bar and the Bizarre and The Lawful and the Awful.Tushar Mehta Referring to one of the books, Shah said it attempted to e
